title: eritrichium elongatum
intro: Eritrichium elongatum, also known as the Elongated Fleabane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eritrichium elongatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb for wound care and skin issues. Eritrichium elongatum is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil for medicinal purposes, and it can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
